task.title: Subtract two numbers
task.shortdesc: Get subtraction result using the CALC app.

context.p: This task explains how to subtract one number from another using the CALC app.

taskbody.result: The result from the subtraction is displayed on the screen.

example.title: Subtracting two numbers
example.p: To subtract two numbers, enter 7 − 3. The result is 4.
If the first number is smaller than the second number (for example, 3 − 7), the result is a negative number. In this case, −4 is displayed on the screen.
